data.Test Description: Validate PCIe configuration space register default values and read/write behavior using masked expectations.
data.Remarks: Requires test_common.h providing read_reg, write_reg, and finish. Uses fixed address and mask tables within the test.
data.Test Steps / Procedure:
1. Read each configuration register address where read_mask is non-zero.
2. Compare each read value to its default_value; count any mismatches.
3. For each data pattern (0xAAAAAAAA, 0x55555555, 0xFFFFFFFF, 0x00000000), write to registers with non-zero write_mask.
4. Read back registers with non-zero read_mask after each write.
5. Compute expected = (data_wr & write_mask) | (~write_mask & default_value) and compare to read value; count mismatches.
6. Pass if both def_fail_cnt and wr_fail_cnt are zero; otherwise fail.
data.Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Test passes if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; on mismatch, logs "CFG_RST_FAIL Addr:0x%x" or "CFG_WR_FAIL Addr:0x%x" and finish(1).
data.Gap Analysis: Hardcoded default values may not match silicon; No timing/sequence validation; Limited handling of RO fields via masks only.

data.Test Description: Check DBI-DSP register reset values and read/write functionality using multiple test patterns.
data.Remarks: Depends on test_common.h (read_reg, write_reg, finish). All registers are treated as fully writable and readable.
data.Test Steps / Procedure:
1. Read each DBI-DSP register and compare to default_value (0).
2. For each pattern (0xAAAAAAAA, 0x55555555, 0x00000000), write the value to all registers.
3. Read back each register and compare to the last written value.
4. Increment failure counters on any mismatch.
5. Complete the test and report pass/fail via finish.
data.Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; on failures, logs "DSP_RST_FAIL 0x%x" or "DSP_WR_FAIL 0x%x" and calls finish(1).
data.Gap Analysis: Assumes full read/write access to all bits; No per-bit mask validation; Default values hardcoded to zero.

data.Test Description: Verify DBI-USP GPR registers reset to zero and retain a single written test pattern.
data.Remarks: Relies on test_common.h (read_reg, write_reg, finish). Uses a single data pattern for write/read check.
data.Test Steps / Procedure:
1. Read each GPR register and compare to default_value (0).
2. Write 0xA5A5A5A5 to each GPR register.
3. Read back each register and compare to 0xA5A5A5A5.
4. Count mismatches and finalize result with finish.
data.Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; otherwise finish(1).
data.Gap Analysis: No diagnostic logging on failure; Single data pattern may miss coupling/edge cases; No bitfield or mask-based checks.

data.Test Description: Validate SII RC inbound registers for reset values and read/write integrity with two patterns.
data.Remarks: Depends on test_common.h for register access and test termination. Treats all bits as R/W.
data.Test Steps / Procedure:
1. Read each SII RC register and compare to default_value (0).
2. Write 0xFFFFFFFF to all registers and read back to compare.
3. Write 0x00000000 to all registers and read back to compare.
4. Increment fail counters on mismatches and end test via finish.
data.Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; otherwise finish(1).
data.Gap Analysis: Only two patterns used; No reserved/RO bit consideration; No error recovery or retries.
